reviews.comment:
No aceptan pagos con billeteras virtuales. Solo efectivo o tarjeta. Buena la atencion igual

They don't accept payments with digital wallets. Only cash or card. The service is good, though.

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza la inmundicia de los baños ! 7 de la mañana lleno de gente ! No es pedir nada raro , solo un poco de limpieza! Después te quieren hacer socio! Una verguenza

(Translated by Google)
The filth in the bathrooms is a disgrace! It was packed at 7 am! I'm not asking for anything unreasonable, just a little cleaning! And then they want to make you a member! It's shameful.
